questions.question: Explain the difference between Block Coding and Cyclic Codes in the context of Data Link Layer Error Detection and Correction. (5 marks)
A cyclic code is used to detect errors in a digital signal. Describe the code used to detect errors in a cyclic code. (7 marks)

A Frame with a 16-bit CRC is transmitted over a noisy channel and received with an error of 3 bits. Determine the minimum number of bits that must be changed in the original Frame to correct the error. (6 marks)
